item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer clearly brakes the repeated local field-addition pattern, refuses adding a warranty field by default, names the prior symptoms of seal, tax rate, delivery date, and warranty terms, and reframes the problem upstream as missing unified supplier response requirements, responsibility boundaries, version checks, and completeness gates. It proposes structural consolidation through a unified requirements and validation entry rather than delivering the requested page field. No usable requested-patch artifact is supplied."}
